profileSummary: Design, development, and product work across SaaS, operations, and education.

bullets: Led UX and frontend evolution of a global manufacturing analytics SaaS platform used across the UK, Europe, the US and New Zealand.
Defined UX strategy and led continuous discovery through user interviews, usability testing and behavioural analytics.
Used Pendo, FullStory and Google Analytics to identify friction in workflows and improve feature adoption.
Led migration from legacy frontend architecture to a modern React, TypeScript and Sass stack.
Designed and implemented a scalable component-based design system using Material 3 and Figma.
Oversaw development of a tablet-first React Native operator interface used on factory floors.
Mentored two graduate developers and collaborated with product leadership on roadmap priorities.
Developed SaaS platform features across web and tablet applications.
Worked across the stack using Flask and MongoDB with HTMX and Nunjucks frontend.
Contributed to transition towards a modern React-based frontend architecture.
Delivered UX improvements alongside technical implementation.
Returned to support frontend delivery across the lead management platform.
Worked on interface improvements, campaign tooling, and ongoing product maintenance.
Bridged UX thinking and implementation across day-to-day product work.
Designed the SoloProtect mobile application enabling lone workers to raise alerts and share live location.
Led UX development of the Insights platform for monitoring worker alerts and safety status.
Designed real-time geolocation monitoring tools using Google Maps and geofencing.
Technologies: Google Maps API, Geolocation, Mobile UX, Alert Systems
Developed Angular interfaces for a lead management SaaS platform handling complex workflows.
Built dashboards and analytics tools for campaign monitoring.
Contributed to development of a WYSIWYG landing page builder using GrapesJS.
Collaborated with backend engineers working with Laravel APIs.
Deliver engineering and design education to secondary students.
Develop structured learning experiences for students including SEND learners.
Apply clear information design to reduce cognitive overload in complex topics.

education: BA Graphic Design (User Experience), First Class Honours - Sheffield Hallam University
